prompt: Preserve the original image exactly. Do not change, redesign, or restyle the girl and background. Keep the exact same face, expression, proportions, pose, framing, background, objects, all visible details. Only improve 4K/2K resolution, skin tone, luminance and palete, texture fidelity, and lighting

skin_tone_profile.description: fair natural Asian skin, soft pink undertone, natural visible skin texture, realistic pores, not plastic, not overly airbrushed

lighting.fill_light: soft frontal fill light at low intensity to lift the face, while keeping shadows natural and the skin bright, clean, and readable
